task: Search for a job in Miami, Florida, in Human Resources on target.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to Target Careers and completed a job search for Human Resources in the Miami, Florida area. Final page evidence shows the applied filters 'Human Resources' and 'Within 25 Miles Miami, FL' on the Job Search page, with matching results visible, including 'Human Resources Expert' at 7800 SW 104th St, Miami, FL and 14075 Biscayne Blvd, North Miami Beach, FL. This satisfies the task to search for a job in Miami, Florida, in Human Resources on Target.
final_result_response:
Done. I searched Target careers for “Human Resources” within 25 miles of Miami, FL.

Top matches shown:

- Human Resources Expert, 14075 Biscayne Blvd, North Miami Beach, FL, Part-time

The results page shows 22 jobs total for that search.
action_history: Opening Target: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.target.com/');

Entering job search criteria: await page.locator('e22').fill('Human Resources');
Entering job search criteria: await page.locator('e24').fill('Miami, Florida');
Running the Target job search: await page.locator('e26').click();

Searching keyword Human Resources: await page.locator('e36').click();
Entering Miami location: await page.locator('e331').fill('Miami, FL');
